text.title: PHPUnit Testing Examples
text.summary: Feature test covering CRUD endpoints with assertJsonPath; Unit test with Event::fake() and Mockery.

example.note: actingAs for auth. assertJsonPath not assertJsonStructure. assertSoftDeleted for delete. One behavior per method.
No RefreshDatabase. Event::fake() before action. Mockery for repository. Two separate behaviors in two methods.
fake() after action: the assertion sees an empty fake and passes regardless of event dispatch.
